    // re-added then get wiped.
    this.native.once('idle', function () {
      self._setStyleInFlight = false;
      if (self._overlayCatalog) self._overlayCatalog.replayOnto(self);
    });
    return this;
  }
  // URL → fetch + resolve asynchronously, but still return `this` sync so
  // method chaining works. Errors flow to the map's error channel.
  var getToken = this._tilesAuth ? function () { return self._tilesAuth.getToken(); } : null;
  if (typeof bemap.TilesStyle !== 'undefined') {
    bemap.TilesStyle.fetch(this.ctx, urlOrObject, { getToken: getToken })
      .then(function (style) {
        bemap.TilesStyle.resolvePlaceholders(style, self.ctx, tilesFile);
        bemap.TilesStyle.hardenSymbolCollisions(style);
        self._currentStyleSpec = style;
        self._setStyleInFlight = true;
        self.native.setStyle(style);
        // 'idle' (not 'styledata') — see in-line setStyle path above.
        self.native.once('idle', function () {
          self._setStyleInFlight = false;
          if (self._overlayCatalog) self._overlayCatalog.replayOnto(self);
        });
      })
      .catch(function (err) {
        self._fireError(err instanceof bemap.Error ? err : new bemap.Error({
          code: bemap.Error.STYLE_LOAD_FAILED, message: 'setStyle failed: ' + (err && err.message)
        }));
      });
  } else {
    try { this.native.setStyle(urlOrObject); } catch (e) {}
  }
  return this;
};

/**
 * Get the current MapLibre style spec (the one resolved and applied by the
 * library — same shape `getStyle()` would return).
 * @public
 * @since 2.0.0
 * @return {Object}
 */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.getStyle = function () { return this._currentStyleSpec || this.native.getStyle(); };

/* --- Token introspection --- */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.getToken = function () { return this._tilesAuth ? this._tilesAuth.getToken() : null; };
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.isTokenValid = function () { return !!(this._tilesAuth && this._tilesAuth.isValid()); };
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.refreshToken = function () {
  if (!this._tilesAuth) return Promise.resolve(null);
  return this._tilesAuth.refresh();
};

/* --- Browser cache --- */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.enableBrowserCache = function () {
  if (this._browserCache) this._browserCache.enable();
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.disableBrowserCache = function () {
  if (this._browserCache) this._browserCache.disable();
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.getBrowserCacheStats = function () {
  return this._browserCache ? this._browserCache.getStats()
    : { enabled: false, hits: 0, misses: 0, entries: 0, bytesEstimated: 0 };
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.clearBrowserCache = function () {
  if (this._browserCache) return this._browserCache.clear();
  return Promise.resolve();
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.onCacheStats = function (fn) {
  if (typeof fn !== 'function') return;
  this._cacheStatsListeners = this._cacheStatsListeners || [];
  this._cacheStatsListeners.push(fn);
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.offCacheStats = function (fn) {
  if (!this._cacheStatsListeners) return;
  for (var i = this._cacheStatsListeners.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (!fn || this._cacheStatsListeners[i] === fn) this._cacheStatsListeners.splice(i, 1);
  }
};

/* --- Surgical layer mutation --- */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.setPaintProperty = function (layerId, name, value) {
  try { this.native.setPaintProperty(layerId, name, value); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.setLayoutProperty = function (layerId, name, value) {
  try { this.native.setLayoutProperty(layerId, name, value); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.setFilter = function (layerId, filter) {
  try { this.native.setFilter(layerId, filter); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.setLayerZoomRange = function (layerId, minzoom, maxzoom) {
  try { this.native.setLayerZoomRange(layerId, minzoom, maxzoom); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
  return this;
};

/* ============================================================
 * Cross-engine camera tour (v2.0) — MapLibre real-animation
 *
 * Same waypoint shape as the Leaflet and OL impls. MapLibre gets
 * full pitch + bearing per waypoint.
 * ============================================================ */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.cameraTour = function (options) {
  var opts = options || {};
  var waypoints = opts.waypoints || [];
  if (!waypoints.length) return { stop: function () {}, resume: function () {} };
  var self = this;
  var i = 0, stopped = false;
  function next() {
    if (stopped) return;
    if (i >= waypoints.length) {
      if (opts.loop) i = 0;
      else { if (typeof opts.onComplete === 'function') opts.onComplete(); return; }
    }
    var wp = waypoints[i++];
    self.native.easeTo({
      center: [wp.lon, wp.lat],
      zoom: wp.zoom,
      pitch: wp.pitch,
      bearing: wp.bearing,
      duration: wp.duration || 2000
    });
    setTimeout(next, wp.duration || 2000);
  }
  next();
  var controller = {
    stop: function () { stopped = true; if (typeof self._unregisterEffect === 'function') self._unregisterEffect('cameraTour'); },
    resume: function () { if (stopped) { stopped = false; next(); } }
  };
  if (typeof self._registerEffect === 'function') self._registerEffect('cameraTour', function () { controller.stop(); });
  return controller;
};

/* --- Globe spinner --- */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.spinGlobe = function (options) {
  var self = this;
  var opts = options || {};
  var speed = typeof opts.speed === 'number' ? opts.speed : 0.05; // deg/s
  this.stopSpinGlobe();
  this._globeSpinTimer = setInterval(function () {
    if (!self.native) return;
    var c = self.native.getCenter();
    self.native.setCenter([c.lng + speed, c.lat]);
  }, 50);
  if (typeof this._registerEffect === 'function') {
    this._registerEffect('spinGlobe', function () { self.stopSpinGlobe(); });
  }
  return { stop: function () { self.stopSpinGlobe(); }, resume: function () { self.spinGlobe(opts); } };
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.stopSpinGlobe = function () {
  if (this._globeSpinTimer) {
    clearInterval(this._globeSpinTimer);
    this._globeSpinTimer = null;
  }
  if (typeof this._unregisterEffect === 'function') this._unregisterEffect('spinGlobe');
  return this;
};

/* --- 3D buildings (real implementation) --- */
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.add3DBuildings = function (options) {
  var self = this;
  var opts = options || {};
  var layerId = opts.layerId || 'bemap-3d-buildings';
  // Per-add cancellation token. When `remove3DBuildings` fires while
  // the queued `fn` is still pending (style hasn't loaded yet), the
  // token is flipped so the deferred add bails out instead of
  // resurrecting the layer the user just removed.
  var token = { cancelled: false };
  var fn = function () {
    if (token.cancelled) return;
    if (self.native.getLayer(layerId)) return;
    var src = opts.source || 'tiles';
    if (!self.native.getSource(src)) return;
    self.native.addLayer({
      id: layerId,
      type: 'fill-extrusion',
      source: src,
      'source-layer': opts.sourceLayer || 'building',
      minzoom: opts.minzoom || 13,
      paint: {
        'fill-extrusion-color': opts.color || '#bdbdbd',
        'fill-extrusion-height': opts.height || ['coalesce', ['get', 'render_height'], ['get', 'height'], 10],
        'fill-extrusion-base': opts.base || 0,
        'fill-extrusion-opacity': opts.opacity != null ? opts.opacity : 0.7
      }
    });
  };
  self._3dBuildingsTokens = self._3dBuildingsTokens || {};
  self._3dBuildingsTokens[layerId] = token;
  if (this.native.isStyleLoaded()) fn();
  else this.native.once('load', fn);
  if (this._overlayCatalog) this._overlayCatalog.register('3dbuildings', layerId, function (map) {
    if (!map.native.getLayer(layerId)) fn();
  });
  if (typeof this._registerEffect === 'function') {
    this._registerEffect('3DBuildings', function () { self.remove3DBuildings({ layerId: layerId }); });
  }
  return this;
};
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.remove3DBuildings = function (options) {
  var opts = options || {};
  var layerId = opts.layerId || 'bemap-3d-buildings';
  // Cancel any pending deferred add so it can't resurrect the layer.
  if (this._3dBuildingsTokens && this._3dBuildingsTokens[layerId]) {
    this._3dBuildingsTokens[layerId].cancelled = true;
    delete this._3dBuildingsTokens[layerId];
  }
  try { if (this.native.getLayer(layerId)) this.native.removeLayer(layerId); } catch (e) {}
  if (this._overlayCatalog) this._overlayCatalog.unregister('3dbuildings', layerId);
  if (typeof this._unregisterEffect === 'function') this._unregisterEffect('3DBuildings');
  return this;
};

/* --- Tear-down extension --- */
var _origRemoveMapLibre = bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.remove;
bemap.MapLibreMap.prototype.remove = function () {
  // Tear down every active effect first — without this, timers
  // (spinGlobe), animation frames (animateAlongRoute) and SW handles
  // (browser cache) leak across SPA navigation.
  try { this.clearAllEffects(); } catch (e) { /* keep going */ }
  try { if (this._tilesAuth) this._tilesAuth.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
  try { if (this._browserCache) this._browserCache.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
  try { if (this._overlayCatalog) this._overlayCatalog.clear(); } catch (e) {}
  this.stopSpinGlobe();
  if (typeof _origRemoveMapLibre === 'function') return _origRemoveMapLibre.apply(this, arguments);
  if (this.native && typeof this.native.remove === 'function') this.native.remove();
};

// Popup clearPopup (real impl in popup sub-file)
// =========================================================================
